name: set_material_property
description: Set a shader property on a Material asset. Supports textures, colors, floats, ints, vectors, and shader keywords. Use get_asset_property to list available properties first if unsure of property names. Common URP/Lit properties: _BaseMap (albedo texture), _BumpMap (normal map), _MetallicGlossMap (metallic texture), _BaseColor (tint color), _Metallic (float 0-1), _Smoothness (float 0-1).

value.description: Value to set. Interpretation depends on type: texture = asset path (e.g. 'Assets/Textures/T_Albedo.png'), color = 'r,g,b' or 'r,g,b,a' (0-1 floats), float = number, int = number, vector = 'x,y,z,w', keyword = 'enable' or 'disable'.

type.description: Property type. Auto-detected from property name if omitted: names containing 'Map' or 'Tex' → texture, 'Color' → color, otherwise → float.
